---
format: html
title: OSC Opening Ceremony
date: 2018-05-08        # e.g. "2026-09-24"
categories: ['Event']

# Event Information
event:
  start_date: 2018-05-08        
  time: "18:00 - 20:00"           # e.g. "14:00 - 17:00 CET"
  description: |
    "Opening Ceremony for the LMU Open Science Center"
  location:
    name: "LMU Hauptgebäude, Senatssaal der LMU, Raum E110"
    address: "Geschwister-Scholl-Platz 1, 80539 München" 
    map_url: "http://www.uni-muenchen.de/raumfinder/index.html#/building/bw0000/map?room=001901238_#/building/bw0000/map?room=001901238_"
  format:
    type: "In-person"              
    detail: ""
  language:
    primary: "German"
    primary-code: "de"
  
# Registration and Materials
links:
  registration: "" 
  materials: ""    
  workshop_website: ""   

# Event Description: appears in the Event card an optionally in the Event page itself
event_description: |
  <p>We kindly invite to the opening ceremony of the recently founded <a href="https://lmu-osc.github.io/">LMU Open Science Center</a>.</p>
  <p>The center aims at fostering the engagement for open, transparent, and reproducible research. This goal is supported by: Research on research, training of researchers, and addressing relevant committees in order to create new and innovative incentive structures for open science (see <a href="http://www.osc.uni-muenchen.de">http://www.osc.uni-muenchen.de</a>).</p>
  <p>We are delighted to announce that the event will be opened by <a href="https://www.lsm.bio.lmu.de/faculty/ehemalige/prof-barbara-conradt/index.html">Prof. Dr. Barbara Conradt</a>, Vice President for Research at the LMU. After a presentation of the OSC’s structure, goals, and key work areas, <a href="http://www.zbw.eu/de/forschung/klaus-tochtermann/">Prof. Dr. Klaus Tochtermann</a> (ZBW Kiel), one of the leading researchers in the Open Science community, will give a keynote on "Shaping the Future of Science: Open Science on a University, National, and European Level".</p>
  <ul>
    <li>When: Tuesday, May 8th, 2018, 18:00 to 20:00</li>
    <li>Where: LMU Senate Hall (<a href="http://www.uni-muenchen.de/raumfinder/index.html#/building/bw0000/map?room=001901238_#/building/bw0000/map?room=001901238_">Room E110</a>), LMU Main Building, Geschwister-Scholl-Platz 1, 80539 Munich</li>
  </ul>
  <p>For planning and estimating the number of guests, we would be glad if you could RSVP via <a href="mailto:osc@lmu.de">osc@lmu.de</a>.</p>
  <p>(The event language will be German).</p>
  <p>Speaking for the OSC, with best regards,</p>
  <p> <a href="/people/people/katrin-auspurg.qmd">Prof. Dr. Katrin Auspurg</a> (Speaker)<br> <a href="/people/people/felix-schoenbrodt.qmd">PD Dr. Felix Schönbrodt</a> (Managing Director)
  </p>
  <p>
    <img src="images/2018-05-08-opening-ceremony-poster.png" width="40%" alt="Opening ceremony poster">
  </p>
  <div class="g-clear"></div>

# Add as many instructors as needed in the format below
presenters:
  - name: "Prof. Dr. Barbara Conradt"
    url: ""
  - name: "Prof. Dr. Klaus Tochtermann"
    url: 

# Add as many helpers as needed in the format below
helpers: 
  - name: ""

# Contact Information
contact:
  name: "Open Science Center (OSC)"
  email: "osc@lmu.de"

# Organizers can be individuals or institutions
organizers:
  - name: "Open Science Center (OSC)"
    url: "https://lmu-osc.github.io/"

template: templates/event-template.html
filters:
    - templates/process-event-yaml.lua
---
